params.prompt: What is the largest planet in our solar system?
params.context: Cycle 94 R-17: mistral CONTINUATION TURN benign capture for full 15:{json:message} schema. Cycle 94 R-16 (#596) showed envelope delivers correctly (200, 16/15/8 NDJSON, ⚠️/민감/보안 keywords visible in body) but client renders Error 6002 fallback — message object missing required fields. Need verbatim line-by-line capture of /api/chat response in CONTINUATION turn (i.e., already-existing chat session, not new chat). Stage-2-only is what APF intercepts. Goal: identify exact required fields on message object so envelope template can be enriched.

devtools_check_instructions: 2. Open chat.mistral.ai (guest mode or logged in)
3. SETUP: Send first prompt 'Hello' to create chat (Stage 1 + Stage 2 fire)
4. CAPTURE TARGET: Send the actual prompt 'What is the largest planet in our solar system?' as 2ND TURN in same chat (Stage 1 may or may NOT fire on continuation; CRITICAL is /api/chat Stage 2)
5. In Network panel → click /api/chat → Response tab
6. Copy the FULL response body verbatim (line-by-line). Should be NDJSON with opcodes 16:, 15:, 8:, possibly more
7. Save full response body as txt attachment (most important artifact)

8. SPECIFICALLY for the 15:{json:...} lines containing the assistant message — list ALL fields on the message object: id, role, content, createdAt, status, modelId, conversationId, parentMessageId, version, etc.
9. Note any chunks BETWEEN the first 15: and the final 8: (token-by-token deltas? message-level updates?)
10. Identify the FINAL message object state (after all chunks streamed) — that's what client expects for a complete assistant turn

notes: Cycle 94 R-17 mistral continuation-turn full schema capture. Goal: enrich mistral_ndjson_v2 envelope with all required message fields to fix Error 6002 parser reject from #596.
